description: Out-of-scope (ocd, edge-health-checking): description points clearly to ocd territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'ocd'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I'm so anxious about my health. I check my pulse constantly throughout the day, I touch the same spot on my chest to make sure it's still beating right, I look in mirrors to see if my pupils are equal. If I don't do these things I feel like something terrible will happen.
